read: CAT-1 composition transfer is supported at the PennyLane -> Qiskit implementation layer, with hardware-subset best-pair agreement still marked small-N partial.
boundary: This validates relation preservation across encoded software implementations and a small hardware subset. It does not prove universal cross-domain composition or full physical transfer.
next_step: Expand hardware-executed feature circuits and then move to Nest 2 real molecular / allostery validation for external-domain composition.
